#+LATEX_CLASS: veriff
#+LATEX_VARIANT: refresh-overdrive
#+TITLE: Source Blocks Light Test
#+EXPORT_CODE_THEME: light

* Code without line numbers
#+BEGIN_SRC python
def hello():
    print("world")
#+END_SRC

* Code with line numbers
#+BEGIN_SRC python -n
def hello_lines():
    print("world with lines")
#+END_SRC
